_README.purpose: AXIS 1 (model TRAINING LINEAGE) classification per seat. LOAD-BEARING HIGH control. The hinge is what/who trained the model, NOT serving infra. A US-brokered Chinese-lineage model is EXCLUDED from HIGH entirely (no broker/ZDR exception). Mirrors governance/2026-07-13__llm-routing-jurisdiction-policy.md section 3 (CR-001). Genesis (roster owner) maintains this on roster change and notifies Complina (policy section 7).

fields.max_sensitivity: HIGH | MODERATE | LOW. Derived from policy: western-lineage=HIGH; chinese-lineage+verified-US-broker=MODERATE; chinese-lineage+unstated/unverified-broker=LOW; unknown-lineage=LOW.
fields.china_lineage_prefixes: Slug prefixes that FORCE lineage=chinese regardless of this map — a seat matching one of these MUST NOT be classified western here, and MUST carry a route pin (Axis 2). Prevents a mislabel from smuggling a Chinese-lineage model into HIGH.

removed_lineages.note: Seats removed from the roster — must NOT appear in openrouter_models.json at all. Tier A flags any surviving seat/alias (policy section 5.F stale-alias hygiene, tracked with Genesis).
removed_lineages.x-ai/: Grok/xAI REMOVED 2026-07-03 (key deleted, registries stripped). Any x-ai/ or grok* seat/alias in the catalog => BLOCK.

mistralai/.note: France/EU — trusted Western jurisdiction, HIGH-eligible (policy section 3a). Fallback-only is a quality call, not jurisdiction.

perplexity/.note: WRAPPER — HIGH-eligible ONLY while backend set constrained to Western-lineage (policy section 5.D). Re-verify on backend change.

_AMBIGUOUS_UNSTATED_BROKER.note: policy section 4 — 4 new frontier Chinese-lineage seats seated with UNSTATED broker. FAIL-CLOSED to LOW-only until Genesis (roster owner) affirmatively states the broker. If OpenRouter/Together US-brokered they move to MODERATE. These slugs are NOT YET in the Alan-machine catalog (they are on the Mac-Mini refresh); entries here are pre-staged so the gate is correct the moment they land.
